overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the vibrant vineyard countryside of Toussaint, encountering a saddled horse, and approaching a stone gate guarded by two sentries. The clip features bright midday lighting, lush vegetation with colorful wildflowers, and fantasy medieval architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through vineyards and wildflower meadows

entered.detail: wooden wagon or cart partially hidden by bushes at the path edge
winding dirt trail through the countryside
rows of cultivated grapevines on the hillside
colorful red poppies and purple lavender along the path
hazy mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sun-dirt trail through the vibrant Toussaint countryside, passing rows of vineyards on the left and colorful wildflowers on the right. Distant mountains rise against a bright blue sky as the path winds through scattered trees.

events.description: a saddled brown horse appears standing on the left side of the path
character stops walking to pet the horse on its neck
character resumes walking forward past the horse

agents.ego_description: approaches the horse, stops to pet it briefly, then continues walking

notable_agents.action: brown saddled horse standing calmly on the path edge

entered.detail: brown horse with saddle and bags standing on the grassy path edge

segments.scene_description: While walking along the trail, the character encounters a saddled horse standing on the left. The character stops to pet the horse briefly in a sunlit clearing before continuing down the path.

events.description: approaching stone archway gate marking the entrance to a settlement or estate

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stone gate where two guards stand watch

notable_agents.action: two guards standing at attention flanking the stone archway entrance

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with decorative pillars marking the entrance
tall stone tower with orange tiled roof visible in the distance
low stone walls lining the approach to the gate

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the path toward a fortified entrance, where an ornate stone archway and watchtower come into view. Two guards stand watch at the gate as the character approaches the entrance to the estate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a vibrant countryside that transitions from open vineyard landscapes to a fortified estate entrance. It begins with the character walking along a sun-drenched dirt trail, flanked by rows of vineyards and colorful wildflowers under a bright blue sky with distant mountains. As the path winds through scattered trees, the camera follows the character into a sunlit clearing to briefly pet a saddled horse standing by the roadside. The scene then shifts as the character continues forward, with the open terrain giving way to the sight of an ornate stone archway and a towering watchtower. Finally, the movement leads directly toward the fortified gate where two guards stand watch at the entrance to the estate.
